function: () => { const videos = document.querySelectorAll('.projects__card--video video'); return Array.from(videos).map((v, i) => ({ idx: i, src: v.src.split('/').pop(), paused: v.paused, currentTime: v.currentTime.toFixed(2), readyState: v.readyState, error: v.error?.code || null, inViewport: (() => { const r = v.closest('.projects__card--video').getBoundingClientRect(); return r.top < window.innerHeight * 0.6 && r.bottom > 0; })() })); }
